blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 604 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
